title: Black Flash!
description: Adds new pvp and pve mechanic - black flash!
body:
!["Black Flash!" Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/512b51366053d50db44816dd5f1efd39aa3cbae2.png)

![Blank](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4273e6a133ac6ab31cc42d2effa9ccb357b12eed_0.webp)

![About](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f2130ac663f26ce1b6f092511779f13f9b26513d_0.webp)
This mod adds a new combat mechanic - Black Flash.
Now with some chance you can hit with black flash. Mobs can also use black flash (configurable).

<details>
<summary>GIF</summary>

![Blank](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/YIxVXqog/images/329933c9c630feaa2b7947242bde044fb2232810.gif)

</details>





![Blank](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4273e6a133ac6ab31cc42d2effa9ccb357b12eed_0.webp)


![Features](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/13887ee4e12bbb526b397a02ea260faa91d1e5ee_0.webp)

- **Of course the black flashes**
- Configurable black flash chance _(via command and configuration menu, default 1:45)_
- Black flash visual mode _(disable knockback and extra damage, also configurable via command and configuration menu)_
- Mobs can use black flash _(configurable via config menu)_
- High configurability (damage, knockback)
- Ingame configuration menu
- **Multiplayer support**
- **Modded entities support**


![Blank](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4273e6a133ac6ab31cc42d2effa9ccb357b12eed_0.webp)
![Upcoming features](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e4229675aad7be5c1cc10c81b9c10ce0c2344306_0.webp)
| Feature               | Status    |
|----------------------|-----------|
| Better black flash Chaining | Done✅  |
| The number of unleashed black flashes reduces the chance of a black flash.              | Done✅  |
| Black flash user boost _(Cursed energy output/The zone)_|Done✅ |
| More black flash activation factors | Done✅

![Blank](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4273e6a133ac6ab31cc42d2effa9ccb357b12eed_0.webp)

## You can use this mod in your modpack/mod showcase as long as there is a link to the original mod!
[![Discord blocky icon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/54c76928a37c61860b27ad391b5daf8c67fa7ac6.png)](https://discord.gg/DBARwkACZJ)
